title: hagnos #0053
definition:
1) exciting reverence, venerable, sacred
 2) pure
    2a) pure from carnality, chaste, modest
    2b) pure from every fault, immaculate
    2c) clean

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5878\\
